findings.evidence: `rg` shows the only import at line 5, while the file uses `Submodule.span` at lines 69/81/165 and `Algebra.adjoin`/`Subalgebra` at lines 119-174.
findings.fix: Add direct Mathlib imports for the span and subalgebra/adjoin APIs used here, for example the appropriate `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Span.*` and `Mathlib.Algebra.Algebra.Subalgebra.*` modules, alongside the matrix-coefficient import.
findings.issue: The file only imports `TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Comodule.MatrixCoefficient`, but it directly uses `Submodule.span`, `Submodule.span_le`, `Submodule.span_induction`, `Subalgebra`, and `Algebra.adjoin`.

summary: The new material is in the right comodule/matrix-coefficient area, but the new file relies on transitive Mathlib imports for the generated subobjects it defines.
